scripts.use-keys: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const p=path.join(__dirname,'../OPEN-THIS-FILE-ADD-YOUR-KEYS.txt'); const s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); const lines=s.split('\n').filter(l=>/^[A-Z_]+=/.test(l.trim())); fs.writeFileSync('.env.local', lines.join('\n')); console.log('Done. Keys in place. Run: npm run start');"
scripts.setup: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('.env.local')) fs.copyFileSync('.env.example','.env.local'); console.log('Created .env.local — add your Supabase + OpenAI keys, then run: npm run start');" && npm install
